en.🌧️ REGENRADAR – zeigt das DWD-Niederschl: 🌧️ RAIN RADAR – shows the DWD precipitation radar as a tile, centred on your municipality. (This instance does NOT create warnings – use the "Warning centre" for that.)
en.Animation: Anzahl Zeitschritte (à 5 min): Animation: number of time steps (5 min each)
Source: open DWD GeoServer (maps.dwd.de) – no login required. The DWD updates the precipitation radar roughly every 5 minutes.
en.Nicht konfiguriert – bitte eine Gemeinde: Not configured – please select a municipality
